title: Enable V-Order and add broadcast join hints
description: Set V-Order Spark config on gold writes, run OPTIMIZE on existing tables, add broadcast hints for small dimension joins, enable DataFrame caching where appropriate.
acceptanceCriteria: OPTIMIZE run on all gold tables (Erik in Fabric)
Broadcast hints applied to dim_country, dim_material, dim_indicator joins
DataFrame caching used for reusable intermediates
notes: Touches silver-to-gold2 — runs after task-012_2 (file overlap).
V-Order is Fabric-specific; document for portfolio.
